pendingCommands.label: FEATURE: .github/workflows/main.yml — enforce CI/CD pipeline
pendingCommands.output:
✅ CI Pipeline enforced:
• npm test must pass 100%
• npm lint must have 0 errors
• npm build must succeed
• GitHub Actions CI must be green
• All PRs to main require approval
• Direct commits to main are blocked

pendingCommands.label: ADMIN: enable branch protection on main (require PR review + CI green)

value.prompt:
gh api repos/:owner/:repo/branches/main/protection --input - << EOF
{
  "required_status_checks": {"strict": true, "contexts": ["test", "lint", "build", "gate"]},
  "required_pull_request_reviews": {"required_approving_review_count": 1},
  "enforce_admins": true,
  "dismiss_stale_reviews": false,
  "require_code_owner_reviews": false
}
EOF
